titleStmt.title: SII 24.117: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 117. (A.R. No. 437 of 1954-55.) II PRĀKĀRA, INNER WALL OF THE SANDAL-PASTE ROOM.

summary.p: Commences with the praśasti Pūmādu puṇara, etc. Registers a gift of 3 mā of land bounded by the Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻaṉ-tirunandavanam on the west, Rājādhirājaṉ-tirunandavanam on the north, Āḷappiṟandān-tirunandavanam on the east and Kāvēri on the south by Tillaiyaḻagiyār the mother of queen Araiyaṉulaguḍaiyār alias Olōga (Lōka)mahādēviyār to Kandāḍai Tiruva raṅga-nārayāṇaṉ Śrī Śaḍagōpaṉ for a flower garden in her name and for her own welfare, at the instance of Kalivalam-uḍaiyāṉ Tiruvāyikkuḷam-uḍaiyāṉ alias Vaḷavanārāyaṇa-mūvēndavēḷāṉ, the Śrīkāryam of the temple. The record is dated in the 10th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
...§ svasti śrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpat tan tiruppatumalar mannavar cūṭi mannilavurimaiyāl maṇimuṭicūṭic ceṅkol cenṟu ticai toṟum vaḷaṟpa
veṅkali nīṅki meyyaṟan=taḻaippak kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭarmalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru kuṭai niḻaṟṟa vīrasiṅhāsanattu mukkok kiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟirun
taruḷiya kopparakecarip paṟmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkat tāḻvār koyilukku śrīkāriyañ ceyki
ṟa kalivala muṭaiyān veḷān tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyānāna vaḷavanārāyaṇa muven=ta veḷān Ēvaṟpaṭi Ikkoyilil tirunan=tavānam tanmañceykiṟa nampirāṭṭiyār Araiyan Ulakuṭaiyārāna Oloka māteviyār tāyār til
laiyaḻakiyāṟkku Ivvūr śrīvaiyiṣṇavaril kan=tāṭai tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇan śrī caṭa kopanen na Ivvūril vaṭa pakkattil tirutturai mukattukku meṟku jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻan tirunan=tavānattukku meṟkum
rājādhirājan tirunan=tavānattukku vaṭakkum Āḷappiṟan=tān tirunan=tavānattukkuk kiḻakkum kāverikku teṟkum Āka Ivvicain=ta perunānkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam munṟumā nilam munṟumāvum tillaiyaḻaki tirunan=tavānamenṟu ceytu tiruppaḷḷittāmakku
ṟaivaṟa� n nampirāṭṭiyār tāyār tillaiyaḻakiyāṟku naṉṟāka venṟu tiruppaḷḷittāmam paṟittup paṇiyniṟka kaṭavenāka sammatitten kan=tāṭait tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇan śrīcaṭakopanen Ivaṉum Ivan vaṅcattārume ceyyakaṭavatāna maikkuk koyiṟkaṇakku tiruvara
ṅkap piriyan Eḻuttu Itu śrīvayiṣṇavappiriyanneḻuttu kan=tāṭait tiruvaraṅkanārā yaṇanneḻuttu kan=tāṭai śrī caṭakopanneḻuttu Aṇiyaraṅkadāsan neḻuttu Iṭavait tirumaṅkai nampiyeḻuttu Oli konṟai śrīvahiṣṇavanampi Eḻuttu Itu śrīvayiṣṇavara
kṣai ...—
Digital edition of SII 24.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
